title: mentha flavescens
intro: Mentha flavescens, also known as yellow mint or Japanese peppermint, is a perennial herb native to China and Japan. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to calm digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Mentha flavescens include relief from nausea, vomiting, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cognitive function. Mentha flavescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, essential oil, and tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
